_comment: F2 before-preferred case: pickup hard TW [0, 4000] contains preferred [3000, 3500], but delivery's hard TW [1500, 2000] caps the route — latest-feasible pickup is 2000 - 400 (travel pickup->delivery) - 100 (pickup service) = 1500, still before preferred_start=3000. Pass shifts pickup to 1500 (as late as feasible), paying 1.0 * (3000 - 1500) = 1500 soft_cost_before.
